description: Paid media push telling Teeccino's versatility story — 4 hero flavors × 4 formats. 16 SKUs in scope. $15K over 31 days, Meta 80% / Google 20%. Budget reallocated from Meta COLD. KPI: account-level MER floor ≥ 6.0x.

brief.objectiveNarrative: Consideration with long attribution — prospects click through to hero PDP or collection page, browse the 4-format lineup, either add to cart or enter retargeting funnel. Direct-response conversion expected to lag.
brief.kpiRationale: Current April MTD MER = 8.25x. Accepting ~28% dilution for TOF consideration push. Below 6.0x for 5+ consecutive days = pause trigger.
brief.budgetSource: Reallocate from Meta COLD (pause on launch day, ~$447/day funds Meta $400/day)

audience.google: Similar audiences + in-market coffee alternatives + brand-defense search

tasks.label: Fill in campaign brief (interactive with Justin)
Draft Google RSAs per hero flavor
Draft Meta primary text + headline per hero
Dispatch missing photography needs to AssetSmith
Dispatch LP spec to ThemeSmith (if needed)

openQuestions.q: Tee-Bag gap resolution — produce missing photography (hold 5/4 launch), push launch, swap format, or narrow to 3 heroes?
DDR Tee-Bag SKU — is it 43110 (new-package manifest) or 43111 (brief as locked)?
Visual verification of 30005 and 30011L — borrowed/wrong-SKU hero images or legitimate?
PDPs vs. custom versatility LP for landing destination?
AdSmith Meta token — is ads_management scope confirmed?

assumptions: Meta COLD can be paused without account-level reach loss (retargeting + versatility replace TOF function).
Existing multi-format hero photography exists — REJECTED by audit 2026-04-15. 5/16 SKUs lack launch-ready hero imagery; all 4 Tee-Bag SKUs broken. See asset-audit.md.
PDPs tell the 4-format story well enough without a custom LP (evaluate in M4).
Google PMax will respect $100/day cap without cannibalizing brand-defense search.

alerts.summary: Photo asset audit: 5/16 SKUs missing launch-ready hero imagery; all 4 Tee-Bag SKUs broken.
alerts.detail: 40110 (FR Tee-Bag) folder exists but no FRONT-01 hero. 45071 (A&P Tee-Bag), 43110/43111? (DDR Tee-Bag), 40081 (Mocha Tee-Bag), 30008 (FR Instant Coffee) — no folder. Red flags on 30005 and 30011L (filename-SKU mismatch suggesting borrowed/wrong assets). See asset-audit.md.

alerts.summary: SKU identity discrepancy: brief says 43111 for DDR Tee-Bag; new-packaging manifest says 43110 is the new-package SKU.
alerts.detail: Needs Justin confirmation before commissioning DDR Tee-Bag photography — wrong SKU would mean wrong pack design.
